description: Gadfly writing coach: debounced analysis, inline annotations, research pane, and annotation lifecycle.

workflows.name: Gadfly analysis triggers after typing pause
steps: Navigate to /editor.
Type two or three sentences of argumentative prose.
Stop typing and wait ~2 seconds.
Verify a network request is sent to /api/gadfly/analyze.
Verify the debug indicator pulses while analysis is in progress.

workflows.name: Annotations highlight text in the editor
steps: Type a claim without evidence (e.g. 'Studies show that X is always true.').
Wait for Gadfly analysis to complete.
Verify highlighted spans appear in the editor text.
Verify numbered annotation markers are visible.

workflows.name: Hovering an annotation shows details
steps: Trigger Gadfly annotations on some text.
Hover over a highlighted span.
Verify a tooltip or detail popover appears.
Verify it shows the annotation category and feedback.

workflows.name: Clicking an annotation opens the research pane
steps: Trigger Gadfly annotations on some text.
Click on a highlighted annotation.
Verify the research pane opens on the right side.
Verify it shows research tasks (fact-check, evidence, counterpoint, or context).
Verify sources are listed with title, domain, and link.

workflows.name: Dismissing an annotation removes it
steps: Trigger annotations and open the research pane for one.
Click the dismiss button.
Verify the annotation highlight is removed from the editor.
Verify the research pane closes or shows next annotation.

workflows.name: Acknowledging an annotation marks it without removing
steps: Open the research pane for an annotation.
Click the acknowledge button.
Verify the annotation visual state changes (e.g. muted highlight).
Verify the annotation is no longer flagged as active.

workflows.name: Annotations show severity-based coloring
steps: Trigger multiple annotations with different severities.
Verify low-severity annotations use a subtle highlight color.
Verify high-severity annotations use a stronger highlight color.

workflows.name: Gadfly error does not break the editor
steps: Intercept /api/gadfly/analyze and return a 502 error.
Type text in the editor.
Wait for the analysis attempt.
Verify the editor remains fully functional.
Verify an error indicator appears in the debug pane (if open).
Verify no crash or blank screen.

workflows.name: Debug pane shows analysis details
steps: Navigate to /editor (dev mode).
Press Ctrl+Shift+D to open the debug pane.
Type text and wait for Gadfly analysis.
Verify the debug pane shows request/response details.
Verify it displays token usage, latency, and model name.
Verify the copy button works for JSON export.

workflows.name: New edits supersede pending analysis
steps: Type a sentence and immediately type another before analysis completes.
Verify only the latest analysis request is processed.
Verify annotations reflect the final document state, not an intermediate one.
